UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and wallet information within the MatchFlow app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

numericId.description: A unique 7-9 digit numeric identifier for the user.

authProviderId.description: Identifier from the external authentication system for this user.

username.description: A unique, user-facing name for the user.

bio.description: A short description or biography written by the user.

preferredGenders.description: An array of genders the user is interested in matching with.

location.description: The user's general location for proximity matching.

relationshipGoal.description: What the user is looking for (e.g., Casual, Long-term).

interests.description: A list of interests and hobbies of the user.

profilePhotoUrls.description: An array of URLs pointing to the user's profile photos.

coinBalance.description: The current virtual coin balance of the user.

lastCheckInDate.description: The date of the user's last daily check-in (YYYY-MM-DD).

checkInStreak.description: The current number of consecutive days the user has checked in.

isVerified.description: Whether the user's identity has been verified via AI face comparison.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user has administrative privileges.

isCoinseller.description: Whether the user is an official coin seller.

isSupport.description: Whether the user is an official support agent.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

lastActiveAt.description: Timestamp of the user's last activity.

CoinTransaction.title: CoinTransaction
CoinTransaction.description: Records individual transactions of virtual coins.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CoinTransaction entity.

type.description: The type of coin transaction (e.g., recharge, deduction, award, check-in).

description.description: A human-readable description of the transaction.

CallSession.title: CallSession
CallSession.description: Represents an active call session between two users.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: A user report submitted for review.

definition.description: Stores user profiles including their coin balance.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Records individual coin transactions for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific coin transaction.

params.name: chatId
params.description: Unique ID for the call session (sorted combined UIDs).

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier for a report.
